cards.notes:
Design-XX-Placeholder

Note — Placeholder cards exist so that the set file always has at least one card while exporting.

cards.rules_text:
Scry 2, then draw two cards.
Foretell {1}{U} [i](During your turn, you may pay {2} and exile this card from your hand face down. Cast it on a later turn for its foretell cost.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“It's beautiful, isn't it...? You could get lost for days just looking at it.”
— J.P. Watterson[/i]
cards.notes:
Design-CU-Free-Slot
Tag-Canon-Reprint

!group interlude-00
!tag canon

Flavour — Watterson musing about the Multiverse

cards.rules_text:
[i]Landfall[/i] — Whenever a land you control enters, you gain 1 life. Then you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.
As long as you control seven or more lands with different names, if you would draw a card except the first one you draw in each of your draw steps, draw two cards instead.
cards.notes:
Design-MM-Worldwalker-Aarie
Lore-Character-Aarie
Lore-World-Lusteria
Style-Showcase-Lusteria
Style-Watermark-Lusteria

!group worldwalker
!tag<character> aarie
!tag<world> lusteria

cards.rules_text:
[i]Landfall[/i] — Whenever a land you control enters, Molly deals 1 damage to each opponent. Put a +1/+1 counter on her.
As long as you control seven or more lands with different names, double all damage that sources you control would deal to your opponents and permanents your opponents control.

cards.rules_text:
[i]Landfall[/i] — Whenever a land you control enters, Molly deals 1 damage to each opponent. Put a +1/+1 counter on her.
As long as you control seven or more lands with different names, double all damage that sources you control would deal to your opponents and permanents your opponents control.

cards.rules_text:
[i]Landfall[/i] — Whenever a land you control enters, you gain 1 life. Then you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.
As long as you control seven or more lands with different names, if you would draw a card except the first one you draw in each of your draw steps, draw two cards instead.
